tests.description: ShaderMaterial is created with correct uniforms (uTime, uBassEnergy, uTrebleEnergy, uMotionAmplitude, uPointerDisturbance, uPointerPos, uPaletteHue, uPaletteSaturation, uBreathScale, uCadence, uBasePointSize)
aRandom attribute is present with 3 components per point
aHueOffset attribute is present with 1 component per point
Uniforms update correctly when draw() is called with varying bassEnergy values
Uniforms update correctly when draw() is called with varying trebleEnergy values
uTime uniform advances with elapsed time (not stuck at 0)
Mesh-level rotation still responds to bassEnergy (macro rotation offset)
Mesh-level Z breathing still works with motionAmplitude
Pointer disturbance uniform updates from frame pointer position
Warp continues when bassEnergy and trebleEnergy are both 0 (time-based evolution still active via uTime advancing)
No CPU-side position buffer writes occur in draw() (posAttr.needsUpdate is NOT set)
ShaderMaterial uses AdditiveBlending and depthWrite: false
Cleanup disposes ShaderMaterial and geometry correctly
Reduced motion (motionAmplitude < 1) scales uMotionAmplitude uniform
Point count respects quality tier maxPoints
Deterministic — same seed produces same aRandom values
vertexShader and fragmentShader strings are non-empty on the material
uBreathScale uniform changes over time (not constant)
uCadence uniform reflects cadence param from VisualParams
No localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookie access during init or draw
